channel.title: bare on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in bare on IT notes

item.title: Git SSH
item.description: To create a git repository and access to it via ssh: $ ssh your.host $ mkdir my-new-repo $ cd my-new-repo $ git --bare init To access your repo (clone it): $ git clone ssh://user@your.host:2222/~user/my-new-repo
